channel.title: _menus on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in _menus on James Akl

item.title: Lists
item.description: I update this page regularly with resources that may be helpful to others. Learning and reference materials marked as “Online” are freely accessible. Learning Material Mathematics Foundations of Applied Mathematics · Book series by Humpherys & Jarvis Numerical Algorithms · Online book by Justin Solomon Mathematics for Machine Learning · Online book by Deisenroth, Faisal, and Ong

item.title: Posts
item.description: Articles Matrix calculus ‘Matrix derivative’ in formal settings. QP and least squares Relationship between QP and least squares. Spatial transforms Interpreting rigid-body transforms. Robot mechanics Robot kinematics and dynamics. Defining a robot Discussing the question “What is a robot?”. Projects Convex optimization Problems with my proofs and solutions.

item.title: Research
item.description: Publications [PDF] Cut Sequencing Algorithm for Safely Disassembling Large Structures, 2023 IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC). James Akl; Sumanth Pericherla; Berk Calli. [PDF] Vision-Based Oxy-Fuel Torch Control for Robotic Metal Cutting, 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS). James Akl; Yash Patil; Chinmay Todankar; Berk Calli. [PDF][Dataset] CNN-Based Task State Estimation for Safer Automation of Oxy-Fuel Metal Cutting, 2023 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE).
